name: Font.FontOrigin
summary: Platform where font originated. This information is useful when searching for appropriate substitues.

enum_values.name: Unknown
enum_values.summary: Origin unknown. Changing an ON_Font characteristic like weight or sytle sets the origin to unknown.

enum_values.name: WindowsFont
enum_values.summary: Set from a Windows IDWriteFont by ON_Font::SetFromDWriteFont() or a Windows LOGFONT by ON_Font::SetFromWindowsLogFont() and FaceName and WindowLogfontName match a font installed on a Windows device.

enum_values.name: AppleFont
enum_values.summary: Set from an Apple CTFont. The PostScriptName() and FamilyName() match a font installed on device running MacOS or iOS. The FaceName() matches the "typeface" name shonw in the MacOS FontBook app.
